question_en: How can I book a service?
answer_id: Booking servis dapat dilakukan melalui aplikasi resmi dealer, telepon bengkel resmi, atau datang langsung ke service counter. Siapkan nomor polisi, nomor rangka bila diminta, model kendaraan, kilometer saat ini, dan keluhan utama.
answer_en: You can book service through the official dealer app, by calling an authorized workshop, or by visiting the service counter. Prepare license plate number, VIN if requested, vehicle model, current mileage, and main complaint.

answer_id: Booking disarankan agar slot teknisi dan suku cadang dapat dipersiapkan. Walk-in tetap dapat diterima mengikuti antrean dan kapasitas dealer.
answer_en: Booking is recommended so technician slots and spare parts can be prepared. Walk-ins may be accepted depending on queue and dealer capacity.

answer_id: Perubahan jadwal dapat dilakukan dengan menghubungi dealer tempat booking dibuat paling lambat satu hari kerja sebelum jadwal jika memungkinkan.
answer_en: Rescheduling can be requested by contacting the dealer where the booking was made, preferably at least one working day before the appointment.

question_en: What should I bring for service?
answer_id: Bawa buku servis atau catatan digital servis, STNK, kartu garansi bila tersedia, dan jelaskan keluhan kendaraan secara spesifik kepada service advisor.
answer_en: Bring the service booklet or digital service record, vehicle registration, warranty card if available, and explain the vehicle symptoms clearly to the service advisor.

question_en: How long does routine service take?
answer_id: Durasi servis berkala ringan umumnya 1 sampai 2 jam setelah kendaraan masuk stall, tetapi dapat berubah tergantung antrean, inspeksi tambahan, dan ketersediaan suku cadang.
answer_en: Light routine service usually takes 1 to 2 hours after the vehicle enters the service stall, but it may vary depending on queue, additional inspection, and parts availability.
